description_long: This is a compact, rectangular toaster with a matte gray top and a warm orange body, accented by yellow details. The top surface features two parallel, elongated slots for inserting bread, with rounded edges and a smooth finish. On the front face, a yellow lever is prominently positioned, likely used to lower the bread into the toaster. The sides each have a large, triangular yellow accent, possibly decorative or functional as a grip or indicator. The toaster sits on four small, black feet, slightly elevating it from the surface. No visible brand logo, power cord, or crumb tray is present, giving it a clean and minimalistic appearance.
description: A small, orange and gray toaster with two bread slots, yellow accents, and a front lever, featuring a smooth, modern design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the yellow lever and the two bread slots on top, with the orange body and gray top clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the large yellow triangular accent and the absence of controls or slots on this face.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the plain orange back and the gray top, with no visible features or controls.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the yellow triangular accent and a glimpse of the front lever.
attribute_toast_slots: Two elongated, parallel slots on the top, evenly spaced, with rounded edges and no visible interior features.
